name: Telr
description: Telr — UAE and MENA payment gateway supporting Visa, Mastercard, and local payment methods with fraud protection and recurring billing.

seo.title: Telr — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Telr: Telr — UAE and MENA payment gateway supporting Visa, Mastercard, and local payment methods with fraud protection and recurring billing.

when_to_use: Accepting cards and wallets for UAE and MENA merchants
Fraud protection with recurring billing for Gulf e-commerce
3DS-authenticated checkout for Saudi Arabia and Egypt merchants

pros: UAE and MENA local method support
Recurring billing available out of box
cons: Dashboard feels dated vs modern gateways
Setup and KYC can drag for weeks
review.verdict: Established MENA gateway with solid local rails — works, but don't expect modern Stripe-grade DX.
review.best_for: Merchants in UAE and broader MENA needing cards plus local alternatives
review.not_for: Developer-first teams wanting modern APIs and fast onboarding

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
